scripts.deploy:pages: git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (echo 'ERROR: uncommitted changes — commit first' && exit 1) && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name coherence
scripts.deploy:itch: git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (echo 'ERROR: uncommitted changes — commit first' && exit 1) && npm run build && butler push dist vuvko/coherence-7drl:html5 --userversion $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
